what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: File contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
standouts: Target uses a board:// URI scheme
Attachment type board_items implies a board-item linkage
No descriptive payload beyond the frontmatter
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
Markdown file stored in channel_attachments/ named att-<uuid>.md
concerns: File provides no human-readable description of what the attachment represents
Target board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A bare channel-to-board-item attachment record with only frontmatter and no explanatory content.
questions: What does board item item-43616aaf represent?
Why was this attachment created at this timestamp?
Is there supposed to be a payload or summary for board_items attachments?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to attach a board item to a channel; the file does exactly that via metadata, but carries no additional content.
intention_signals: Capture a cross-reference between a channel conversation or memory and a specific board item so it can be retrieved or contextualized later.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped link between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-43616aaf, enabling channel-memory indexing of board references.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-43616aaf via a board_items attachment type.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is associated with the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
